scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && mkdir -p dist && cp -r client/dist/* dist/
scripts.pack: npm run build && zip -r Archive.zip app.js package.json package-lock.json shared/dist shared/package.json server/dist server/package.json client/dist client/package.json && echo '\n[pack] Archive.zip ready. NOTE: service account JSON is intentionally excluded — set GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS as an env var on the host and upload the JSON out-of-band (e.g. via SFTP to a path outside the web root).'
